mapper.sql: A.BATCH_RESULT_ID AS batchResultId , A.BATCH_SCHDUL_ID AS batchSchdulId , A.BATCH_OPERT_ID AS batchOpertId , A.PARAMTR AS paramtr , A.STTUS AS sttus , A.ERROR_INFO AS errorInfo , A.EXECUT_BEGIN_TM AS executBeginTime , A.EXECUT_END_TM AS executEndTime , CASE A.STTUS WHEN 'S' THEN '성공' WHEN 'F' THEN '실패' WHEN 'R' THEN '실행중' ELSE A.STTUS END AS sttusNm , (SELECT O.BATCH_OPERT_NM FROM TB_BATCH_OPERT O WHERE O.BATCH_OPERT_ID = A.BATCH_OPERT_ID) AS batchOpertNm , A.FRST_REGISTER_ID AS frstRegisterId , TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS frstRegisterPnttm
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM TB_BATCH_RESULT A WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.EXECUT_BEGIN_TM DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_BATCH_RESULT A WHERE 1=1
